name: telemetry baseline: budget_impact_estimate block must include {tokens_per_invocation, expected_invocations_per_day, monetary_estimate_usd}
command:
mkdir -p skills/x && printf 'name: x
description: x
budget_impact_estimate:
  tokens_per_invocation: bad-not-a-number
' > skills/x/SKILL.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/budget-impact-required.sh"
